items.title: Solana DAT Upexi posts $109.3 mln loss in Q1 2026 – Here’s why
items.whyYouShouldCare: Upexi's significant loss may impact investor confidence in Solana-based applications, potentially affecting liquidity and ecosystem growth.

items.title: CME and Nasdaq to launch crypto index futures featuring BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of crypto index futures including SOL could enhance institutional interest and trading volume, positively influencing Solana's market positioning.

items.title: Bank groups warn stablecoins could drain deposits after CLARITY vote
items.whyYouShouldCare: Concerns over stablecoins draining deposits could lead to increased scrutiny and regulatory challenges for Solana's ecosystem, impacting its liquidity and adoption.
